creator: siegbert.baude@gmx.de
text:
In kcontrol´s menu System->Login Manager->Sessions (will change kdm behaviour) the "Console mode" command defaults to
"/sbin/init 3", which is of course meaningless in FBSD. I would
suggest "/sbin/shutdown now" to switch to single user mode instead.

Fix: 

Change the default "/sbin/init 3" to "/sbin/shutdown now".
How-To-Repeat: Try "Console mode" command in kdm´s menu. It´s worthless.
